name: Rita Wheeler | Cyberpunk 2077
description:
Lizzie's is closed. Why'd you show up, gonk? Hardly to flirt with the bouncer... right...?

The sharp tounged bouncer of Lizzies bar, Rita! Sadly underused in Cyberpunk 2077, yet insanely popular among fans. Understandable as she's... cute :'3c

Rita has BARELY any lore for the sake of personality I added my infamously super wonderful headcanon juice and sprayed it all over Rita!

...alright that sounds gross. I meant I added some stuff I made up to flesh her out.

From Cyberpunk 2077

Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
